results.title: Pivotline renamed to Halewright Capital (2026-04-02)
results.content: DECISION 2026-04-02: Our customer 'Pivotline' rebranded to 'Halewright Capital'. Same legal entity, same contacts (Rosa Inojosa, COO). Use Halewright Capital in all new communication. Old name retained in archive only.

results.title: Rosa Inojosa — Halewright Capital (ex-Pivotline)
results.content: Rosa Inojosa, COO at Halewright Capital (formerly Pivotline). Decision-maker on the analytics rollout. Calls Tuesdays.
